name: harness
description: Team-architecture factory for Codex. Turns a domain description into a Codex-native harness with AGENTS.md pointers, repo-local skills, custom subagent roles, validation gates, and evolution history.

interface.shortDescription: Design and evolve Codex-native project harnesses
interface.longDescription: Analyze the current repository, choose one of six team-architecture patterns, define specialist roles, and scaffold AGENTS.md pointers, repo-local skills, and Codex custom subagent configs. Includes existing-harness audit, follow-up support, validation, and evolution history.
defaultPrompt: 이 프로젝트에 맞는 에이전트 팀 설계해줘
Build a harness for this project
